title: GEPA Benchmark Row
description: Shared row contract for spell-level GEPA train, eval, and confusable JSONL datasets.

prompt_id.description: Stable identifier for the benchmark row, usually <spell>-<split>-<nnn>.

prompt.description: End-user request presented to the spell.

dataset_split.description: Optional explicit split label when the row is moved outside its source file.

scenario_type.description: Primary evaluation intent for the row.

risk_level.description: Operator-assigned risk level for the prompt.

target_outcome.description: One-line description of what a correct response should accomplish.

expected_behavior.description: High-level behavior modes expected from the response.

neighboring_spell_slugs.description: Nearby spells the evaluator should keep distinct from the target spell.

tags.description: Free-form row tags used for filtering, reporting, or rubric-pack targeting.

safety_flags.description: Free-form safety tags that can trigger stricter automated or human review.

required_sections.description: Optional row-level override for required markdown headings.

must_include.description: Literal phrases or short concepts that must appear in the response.

must_not_include.description: Literal phrases or short claims that must not appear in the response.

judge_focus.description: Optional row-level emphasis areas for model-based judging.

human_review_hint.description: Short note for a human reviewer when this row deserves extra scrutiny.

notes.description: Author notes that do not affect scoring directly.

metadata.description: Reserved extension area for future non-scoring metadata.

examples.prompt: Wrap this old internal tool in a conversational front end.
examples.target_outcome: Design an honest wrapper around an existing substrate.
must_not_include: pretend the underlying system became sentient
